Hello! Please describe your language learning tour plan, target language, difficulty level (A1-C2), and other details. You can later decide when to schedule the tour
Capturing user message 1: I want to create a German lang...

I want to create a German language tour in Berlin focused on business vocabulary. The tour will be taught in English and is suitable for intermediate (B1) learners. It will include visits to the business district and practice ordering in restaurants.
Capturing AI message 2: Okay, great start! To help me ...
Okay, great start! To help me finalize your "Berlin Business Boost" tour, roughly how long do you envision the tour lasting – a half-day, a full day, or something else?
Capturing user message 3: Yes, the tour will be called "...
Yes, the tour will be called "Business German in Berlin" and will focus on formal business greetings, restaurant vocabulary, and numbers.
Capturing AI message 4: Okay, to make sure we can plan...
Okay, to make sure we can plan your tour effectively, about how long will "Berlin Business Boost" last?
Capturing user message 5: The tour will teach vocabulary...
The tour will teach vocabulary like "Guten Tag", "Auf Wiedersehen", "die Rechnung, bitte", and business meeting terminology.
Capturing AI message 6: Okay, great! To help me finali...
Okay, great! To help me finalize the details, about how long will the "Berlin Business Boost" tour be?
